en_body:
...Night
moon, lifting her hair
bows


...Making
poetry, shyly
hides
inside
 the
fragrance...

a strand of moon-hair


...Night
moon, lifting her hair
bows


...Making
poetry, shyly
hides
inside
 the
fragrance...

1
note: The title turns "trăng" into both moonlight and a moonlike strand of hair.
